message:
feat(share): enhance conversation detection and prompt formatting

Detection Module (detection.rs):
- Add new conversation type detection heuristics
- Improve accuracy for identifying multi-turn vs single-turn patterns
- Add confidence scoring for detection results
- Better handling of edge cases in conversation structure analysis

Prompt Module (prompt.rs):
- Add new prompt templates for various interaction patterns
- Improve context window management for long conversations
- Add utilities for prompt truncation while preserving coherence
- Better formatting for structured data in prompts

These improvements enable more accurate conversation understanding
and better prompt construction for downstream processing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
